vibe: High-end gym aesthetic, motivational fitness imagery, smooth animations, conversion-focused.
slogan: Transform Your Body. Build Your Grind.

marketing.style: Asymmetric, overlapping elements, generous breathing room. Use The Bento Grid Protocol (Tetris mode) for features.

dashboard.style: Dense, card-based grid. Prioritize data clarity. Control Room mode.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF4500] hover:bg-[#FF5722] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,69,0,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#333333] hover:border-[#FF4500] text-white hover:text-[#FF4500] uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300

cards.marketing: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-[#FF4500]/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.dashboard: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#333333] rounded-xl p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200

components.navigation: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10

instructions_to_main_agent: MUST use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing pages, prioritizing overlapping layouts, generous spacing, and asymmetry.
MUST use Shadcn UI primarily for Dashboard interfaces. Heavily customize colors to match the dark luxury theme (remove default Vercel look).
Headings MUST use uppercase styling with tight tracking (Barlow Condensed preferred).
Incorporate framer-motion for smooth entrance animations and hover interactions.
Data dashboard MUST use dense 'gap-4' spacing with a solid 1px border (#333333) and subtle inner glow highlights for premium feel.
ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case based on role.
Ensure responsive design: Stack columns on mobile, use grid layouts on desktop.
Avoid using generic blue/purple gradients; strictly stick to obsidian, charcoal, and neon orange (#FF4500).
